title: AI memory shortage threatens to trigger geopolitical strain, warns SK Group chief

title: China’s New AI Governance Body Explained: Why Beijing Wants to Write the Rules for AI
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming more than a race to build the most advanced models. It is now a competition over who gets to define the rules, standards and frameworks that will govern the technology.
content:
Summary of this article
China has launched the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organisation (WAICO) with 29 countries to promote global AI cooperation and governance.

title: Global AI platforms and models market to grow 63 pc to USD 64 billion in 2026: Gartner
description: Worldwide end-user spending on artificial intelligence (AI) platforms and models is projected to reach USD 64 billion in 2026, up 63.4 per cent from USD 39 billion in 2025, according to a report by Gartner, a business and technology insights company.
content: New Delhi [India], July 20 (ANI): Worldwide end-user spending on artificial intelligence (AI) platforms and models is projected to reach USD 64 billion in 2026, up 63.4 per cent from USD 39 billion in 2025, according to a report by Gartner, a busines... [2295 chars]

title: Why Silicon Valley Can’t Stop Looking Over Its Shoulder at China
